outlets.name: CNN
outlets.headline: US Navy seizes Iranian-flagged vessel as Trump says blockade costs Iran $500M/day
outlets.summary: CNN live coverage of USS Spruance seizing Iranian cargo ship Touska after firing into engine room. Iran vows retaliation. IRNA declines Pakistan Round 2 talks. Ceasefire expires April 22 — 2 days.

outlets.name: NPR
outlets.headline: U.S. seizes Iranian cargo ship near Strait of Hormuz; Iran says it's 'impossible' to reopen strait
outlets.summary: NPR covers first US seizure of ship under blockade. Touska was sanctions-listed for IRGC links. Iran's Ghalibaf: 'It is impossible for others to pass through while we cannot.'

outlets.name: Daily Caller
outlets.headline: Trump Announces US Navy Seized Blockade-Defying Iranian Cargo Vessel After 'Blowing A Hole' In Engine Room
outlets.summary: Daily Caller covers Trump's Truth Social announcement of Touska seizure. Emphasizes first kinetic engagement under blockade. 25 vessels intercepted since April 13.

outlets.name: Fox Business
outlets.headline: Trump declares Iran war is 'very close to being over' as peace talks expected to resume
outlets.summary: Fox Business covers Trump optimism on deal progress alongside Touska seizure. Witkoff heading to Pakistan Tuesday.

outlets.name: Al Jazeera
outlets.headline: Iran war updates: Tehran vows response after Trump says US seized ship
outlets.summary: Al Jazeera comprehensive liveblog covering Touska seizure, Iran retaliation threat, IRNA declining talks, Netanyahu enrichment demands, and ceasefire expiring April 22.

outlets.name: PBS News
outlets.headline: Trump says U.S. seized Iranian-flagged ship near blockade ahead of talks in Pakistan
outlets.summary: PBS covers Touska seizure and upcoming Islamabad Round 2 negotiations. Iran signals unwillingness to attend but contradictory messages from different officials.

outlets.name: Times of Israel
outlets.headline: PM says Israel ready for Iran war resumption, while US gears for another round of talks
outlets.summary: Times of Israel covers Netanyahu declaring all enriched uranium must leave Iran 'by agreement or through renewed fighting.' Israel ready for war resumption if ceasefire expires.

outlets.name: Haaretz
outlets.headline: Netanyahu Says Iran War Not Over, Quips That Milei's Visit Indicates 'Something Big' About to Happen
outlets.summary: Haaretz covers Netanyahu's ominous hint that Milei's visit indicates 'something big.' Isaac Accords signed. War described as 'civilization against barbarism.'

outlets.name: ANI News
outlets.headline: Iran confirms US seizure of ship TOUSKA, says 'will respond and retaliate against this armed piracy'
outlets.summary: ANI covers Iran Armed Forces officially confirming Touska seizure and vowing retaliation. Calls it 'armed piracy' and ceasefire violation. Most direct military retaliation threat since ceasefire began.

outlets.name: Press TV
outlets.headline: How Iran's media shaped unfiltered narratives of war and diplomacy
outlets.summary: Press TV self-referential piece on Iran's media strategy. Also covers EU 'hypocrisy' on international law and Hormuz. Frames blockade as US aggression.
